datapoints.description: Volume read operations per second over 5 minutes
datapoints.name: read_iops

datapoints.description: Volume write operations per second over 5 minutes
datapoints.name: write_iops

datapoints.description: Volume read throughput in bytes per second

datapoints.name: write_throughput

datapoints.description: In-flight I/O operations on the volume device

description: Per-volume Portworx IOPS, throughput, latency, and I/O depth via Thanos Querier
technicalNotes: Performance metrics from px_volume_reads/writes (counter, rate for IOPS), px_volume_read_bytes/written_bytes (counter, rate for throughput), px_volume_dev_read_latency_secs/write_latency_secs (gauge, converted to ms), and px_volume_dev_depth_io (gauge). All rate calculations use 5m window.
name: Portworx_Volume_Performance
